name: @barlevalon/plannotator-compound-skill
description_en: Analyze a user's Plannotator plan archive to extract denial patterns, feedback taxonomy, evolution over time, and actionable prompt improvements — then produce a polished HTML dashboard report. Falls back to Claude Co...
